hooks.command: file_path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4); if echo "$file_path" | grep -q '\.java$'; then echo "\n🔨 Java 컴파일 확인 중..."; cd /Users/seunghwan/Desktop/admin/backend && ./gradlew compileJava --quiet 2>&1 | grep -E "error:|BUILD (SUCCESS|FAILED)"; fi; if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(tsx|ts)$'; then echo "\n🔍 TypeScript 타입 확인 중..."; cd /Users/seunghwan/Desktop/admin/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; fi
